questions.question: Describe the main advantages of using the chalk and talk method over the PowerPoint presentation method in a lecture.
questions.hint: Focus on the benefits related to student engagement and learning outcomes.

questions.question: A lecturer is using the PowerPoint presentation method to teach a topic in Metric Spaces. Which of the following is a disadvantage of this approach?
options: It allows for more dynamic and interactive learning experiences.
It enables the lecturer to quickly review and update the content.
It can lead to a lack of student participation and engagement.
It allows for easier assessment and feedback.

questions.question: An instructor is planning to use a combination of the chalk and talk method and PowerPoint presentation method to teach a topic in Metric Spaces. What is the potential benefit of this approach?
questions.hint: Focus on the benefits related to student engagement and learning outcomes.
